message:
refactor(git): extract cloneInternal helper to deduplicate clone operations

The four clone methods (Clone, CloneWithReference, CloneBare,
CloneBareWithReference) shared ~135 lines of identical setup/teardown
logic. Extract a shared cloneInternal() helper with a cloneOptions struct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
